nasb.text: Isaac his father said to him, “Who are you?” And he said, “I am your son, your firstborn, Esau.”

esv.text: His father Isaac said to him, “Who are you?” He answered, “I am your son, your firstborn, Esau.”

cnv.text: 他父親以撒問他：“你是誰？”他回答：“我就是你的長子以掃。”

ccb.text: 他父亲以撒问道：“你是谁？”以扫回答说：“我是你的长子以扫。”

csbs.text: 他父亲以撒对他说：“你是谁呢？” 他说：“我是你的儿子，你的长子以扫。”
